name: Finance & Unit Economics
description: Revenue models, pricing, cash flow, financial planning, and unit economics that drive P&L performance.

name: Product & Offering
description: Product strategy, roadmap, development lifecycle, customer feedback loops, and competitive positioning.

name: Go-To-Market & Sales
description: Sales process, pipeline management, customer acquisition, channel strategy, and revenue generation.

name: Marketing & Brand
description: Brand positioning, demand generation, content strategy, marketing operations, and market awareness.

name: People & Organization
description: Talent acquisition, culture, performance management, organizational design, and leadership development.

name: Technology & Infrastructure
description: Architecture, engineering practices, security, scalability, and technical debt management.

name: Delivery & Operations
description: Project delivery, operational efficiency, quality assurance, process optimization, and supply chain.

name: Governance & Leadership
description: Strategic planning, decision-making frameworks, board management, risk governance, and executive alignment.
